title: New Age Preview: Daggers!
description: This filament mod is a preview of New Age Update 1.22 for daggers, many features coming soon!
body:
This Mod is a New Age Update Preview Based on My Ideas, here's a list of The Daggers



Wooden Dagger
Stone Dagger
Iron Dagger
Golden Dagger
Diamond Dagger
Copper Dagger
Netherite Dagger



![Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8bed2ed5c1c639ae9b7f1152569db0a539e54331.png)


Enchanments

Stabber (1-5) - increase attack damage of dagger


this mod requires [Filament](https://modrinth.com/project/yANxwqSX)
and 
[Polymer](https://modrinth.com/project/xGdtZczs)
